error_signature: Please contact your admin. n8n isn’t set up to send email right now.
title: Password recovery fails due to email setup
symptom: When attempting to recover the admin password, n8n displays a message indicating that email is not set up, preventing password recovery.
not_this_if: Using a cloud-hosted version of n8n
root_cause: The password recovery process in n8n relies on email notifications to send reset links. If the email configuration is not set up, users cannot recover their passwords and are prompted to contact the admin.
fix_steps: List the running containers using 'docker-compose ps'.
Execute the command 'docker exec -u node -it n8n user-management:reset' to reset the password.
Stop and restart the Docker container.
Access the n8n server and create a new owner account.
agent_instruction: Reset the password using the provided Docker commands and create a new owner account.
